LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NINGBO HENGCHANG INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT CONTEND THAT SERVICE OF THE E-MAIL WITH A COPY OF THE COMPLAINT CONSTITUTES SERVICE OF PROCESS. PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION ADMITS THAT IT HAS YET TO SERVE DEFENDANT PROPERLY. THE MOTION IS PREMATURE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. THE COURT DENIES Defendants NINGBO HENGCHANG INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD'S and ALICE CHEN'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NINGBO HENGCHANG INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff does not contend that service of the e-mail with a copy of the complaint constitutes service of process. Plaintiff's supplemental opposition admits that it has yet to serve defendant properly. The motion is premature. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
